subject: Moodle 5.2, 5.1.4, 5.0.7 and 4.5.11 are now available
body:
https://lists.moodle.org/w/BfYIjL4CajKlz892Qpx4hIIw/tq0lNDXhoqeaSOSsRiZOjA/78922zU0iC26ciBABmhYi2GA

To all registered Moodle Administrators,

Major and Minor Version Release

I'm writing today to let you know that Moodle LMS 5.2, 5.1.4, 5.0.7 and 4.5.11 are now available via the usual open download channels; https://lists.moodle.org/l/BfYIjL4CajKlz892Qpx4hIIw/O6Jwx8Dq68STyFf2vnjo5A/78922zU0iC26ciBABmhYi2GA and Git. The release notes for each version can be found at the following links:

Moodle LMS 5.2 release notes: https://lists.moodle.org/l/BfYIjL4CajKlz892Qpx4hIIw/SPqX5URJm1rTVr73FoEbgQ/78922zU0iC26ciBABmhYi2GA
Moodle LMS 5.1.4 release notes: https://lists.moodle.org/l/BfYIjL4CajKlz892Qpx4hIIw/KzwfvKll93pxMV8923VdWzRg/78922zU0iC26ciBABmhYi2GA
Moodle LMS 5.0.7 release notes: https://lists.moodle.org/l/BfYIjL4CajKlz892Qpx4hIIw/g6tNV0cwWcQ8XKk1RpidPQ/78922zU0iC26ciBABmhYi2GA
Moodle LMS 4.5.11 release notes: https://lists.moodle.org/l/BfYIjL4CajKlz892Qpx4hIIw/d8yc8925892ttdcfLgKLDB6OnA/78922zU0iC26ciBABmhYi2GA

Please note that 5.0.7 will be the last general support release for Moodle LMS 5.0, however it will continue to be supported for security and data loss fixes until 5 October 2026.

==5.2 upgrade debugging messages note==

You may encounter "Deleting question which is no longer linked to a context..." debugging messages during upgrade. This requires no action. We are addressing this known debugging issue under https://lists.moodle.org/l/BfYIjL4CajKlz892Qpx4hIIw/892ZX0ueuJTgtyMsPj0CRy763A/78922zU0iC26ciBABmhYi2GA.

==Security Fixes==

As well as new features, improvements, bug fixes and polishing, there are security fixes that you should be aware of. Details of the security issues that have been fixed in this release are listed at the bottom of this email.

As a registered Moodle admin, you receive notice of fixed security issues before they are published more widely. In approximately one week, the details will also be available from https://lists.moodle.org/l/BfYIjL4CajKlz892Qpx4hIIw/9bd763vxPivwbp8phh21h1Ig/78922zU0iC26ciBABmhYi2GA, including the relevant CVE identifiers. Until those announcements are published next week, please do not publicly disclose information about the security issues (such as posting about them in a forum discussion). This helps ensure you and other registered Moodle admins have time to apply the fixes to their systems before the information is publicly announced.

To avoid leaving your site vulnerable, we highly recommend you upgrade your sites to the latest Moodle LMS version as soon as you can. If you cannot upgrade, then please check the below list carefully and patch your own system or switch off those features. If your Moodle LMS site is hosted on MoodleCloud (https://lists.moodle.org/l/BfYIjL4CajKlz892Qpx4hIIw/tutjq7H836763xCCnl763Mjp9w/78922zU0iC26ciBABmhYi2GA), our team will perform the necessary security updates and no action is required by you.

Fixes and improvements that contribute to security best practices are also an important element of keeping Moodle instances and their data secure. Any security improvements are listed in the release notes.

Thank You

Thank you to everyone who contributed to these releases, whether it was through improvements, new features, bug fixes, feedback, translations or other contributions. This has been a big team effort and as always, thank you for using Moodle LMS and being part of the Moodle open source community.

Michael Hawkins
Moodle HQ

==============================================================================
Security Fixes
==============================================================================
MSA-26-0005: SQL injection risk in external database authentication plugin

Description:       An SQL injection risk was identified in the "external
                   database" authentication plugin (auth_db). Note: This only
                   affected sites with the auth_db authentication plugin
                   enabled.
Issue summary:     SQL injection risk in external database authentication
                   plugin
Severity/Risk:     Serious
Versions affected: 5.1 to 5.1.3, 5.0 to 5.0.6, 4.5 to 4.5.10 and earlier
                   unsupported versions
Versions fixed:    5.1.4, 5.0.7 and 4.5.11
Reported by:       Melvinsh
Issue no.:         MDL-88138
CVE identifier:    Pending
Changes (main):    http://git.moodle.org/gw?p=moodle.git&a=search&h=HEAD&st=commit&s=MDL-88138

==============================================================================
MSA-26-0006:  RCE risk via Moodle's Google Drive repository plugin

Description:       A remote code execution risk was identified in Moodle's
                   Google Drive repository plugin.
Issue summary:     RCE risk via Moodle's Google Drive repository plugin
Severity/Risk:     Serious
Versions affected: 5.1 to 5.1.3, 5.0 to 5.0.6, 4.5 to 4.5.10 and earlier
                   unsupported versions
Versions fixed:    5.1.4, 5.0.7 and 4.5.11
Reported by:       Rojan Rijal
Issue no.:         MDL-88423
Workaround:        Disable the Google Drive repository plugin until the patch
                   has been applied.
CVE identifier:    Pending
Changes (main):    http://git.moodle.org/gw?p=moodle.git&a=search&h=HEAD&st=commit&s=MDL-88423

==============================================================================
MSA-26-0007: Message panel breaks with messages from deleted users (messaging
DoS risk)

Description:       A flaw in message handling of conversations with deleted
                   users could result in active users losing access to their
                   private messages.
Issue summary:     Message panel breaks with messages from deleted users
                   (messaging DoS risk)
Severity/Risk:     Minor
Versions affected: 5.1 to 5.1.3, 5.0 to 5.0.6, 4.5 to 4.5.10 and earlier
                   unsupported versions
Versions fixed:    5.1.4, 5.0.7 and 4.5.11
Reported by:       Adam Jenkins
Issue no.:         MDL-87760
CVE identifier:    Pending
Changes (main):    http://git.moodle.org/gw?p=moodle.git&a=search&h=HEAD&st=commit&s=MDL-87760

==============================================================================
MSA-26-0008: Upgrade PHPUnit version to avoid a security risk (upstream)

Description:       The PHPUnit version in Moodle LMS 4.5 required updating to
                   avoid an upstream Poisoned Pipeline Execution (PPE) risk.
Issue summary:     Upgrade PHPUnit version to avoid a security risk (upstream)
Severity/Risk:     Minor
Versions affected: 4.5 to 4.5.10
Versions fixed:    4.5.11
Reported by:       Huong Nguyen
Issue no.:         MDL-88381
CVE identifier:    CVE-2026-24765
Changes (main): https://github.com/moodle/moodle/commit/bb866dbbd94a5833c063fc92bef9baf272bd675d

==============================================================================
MSA-26-0009: CSRF risk in reset penalty rules functionality

Description:       The grade penalty rules reset function did not include the
                   necessary token to prevent a CSRF risk.
Issue summary:     CSRF risk in reset penalty rules functionality
Severity/Risk:     Minor
Versions affected: 5.1 to 5.1.3 and 5.0 to 5.0.6
Versions fixed:    5.1.4 and 5.0.7
Reported by:       Khải nguyễn Đặng
Issue no.:         MDL-88087
CVE identifier:    Pending
Changes (main):    http://git.moodle.org/gw?p=moodle.git&a=search&h=HEAD&st=commit&s=MDL-88087

==============================================================================
MSA-26-0010: Upgrade AWS SDK for PHP including security fix (upstream)

Description:       The upstream AWS SDK for PHP library was upgraded, which
                   included a security fix.
Issue summary:     Upgrade AWS SDK for PHP including security fix (upstream)
Severity/Risk:     Minor
Versions affected: 5.1 to 5.1.3, 5.0 to 5.0.6, 4.5 to 4.5.10 and earlier
                   unsupported versions
Versions fixed:    5.1.4, 5.0.7 and 4.5.11
Reported by:       Michael Hawkins
Issue no.:         MDL-87598
CVE identifier:    CVE-2025-14761
Changes (main):    http://git.moodle.org/gw?p=moodle.git&a=search&h=HEAD&st=commit&s=MDL-87598

==============================================================================
MSA-26-0011: CSRF and missing capability check in admin/mnet/peers.php

Description:       Insufficient CSRF token and capability checks were applied
                   to an MNet admin setting.
Issue summary:     CSRF and missing capability check in admin/mnet/peers.php
Severity/Risk:     Minor
Versions affected: 5.1 to 5.1.3, 5.0 to 5.0.6, 4.5 to 4.5.10 and earlier
                   unsupported versions
Versions fixed:    5.1.4, 5.0.7 and 4.5.11
Reported by:       Vincent Schneider
Issue no.:         MDL-84495
CVE identifier:    Pending
Changes (main):    http://git.moodle.org/gw?p=moodle.git&a=search&h=HEAD&st=commit&s=MDL-84495

==============================================================================

You are receiving this email because you asked for Moodle security news when you registered a Moodle site. If you no longer wish to receive these emails, please re-register your site with your new preferences or use the unsubscribe link below. Note that this inbox is unmonitored, so replies to this email will not be read.

Link to unsubscribe: https://lists.moodle.org/unsub... [truncado]

subject: Información sobre K12 para nuestro colegio
body:
Buenos días,

Soy director del Colegio Los Pinos (Madrid). Estamos valorando implementar experiencias de Realidad Virtual como apoyo curricular para nuestros 450 alumnos de primaria y secundaria. Me han hablado de su plataforma K12 con contenidos educativos.

¿Podrían enviarme información detallada sobre planes, precios y contenidos disponibles? También nos interesa saber qué necesitamos para el despliegue técnico.

Gracias de antemano.

Juan Martínez
Director - Colegio Los Pinos

subject: Consulta VR para recorrido de patrimonio histórico
body:
Buenas tardes,

Escribo en nombre del Museo de Arte Contemporáneo de Valladolid. Estamos valorando implementar experiencias de Realidad Virtual para enriquecer el recorrido principal de nuestro museo y atraer público joven.

¿Tienen soluciones de VR orientadas específicamente a patrimonio histórico y cultural? ¿Sería posible agendar una demo?

Un saludo,

Laura Sánchez
Directora de Innovación
Museo de Arte Contemporáneo de Valladolid

subject: Información sobre REVI y financiación Min.Cultura
body:
Hola,

Me han comentado que Educa360 tiene el producto REVI orientado a patrimonio histórico, con posibilidad de financiación del 60% a través del Ministerio de Cultura. Estamos gestionando el archivo municipal de Granada y nos interesaría conocer los requisitos para acogernos a esa financiación.

¿Podrían enviarme la información completa de REVI y el procedimiento de solicitud?

Muchas gracias,

Miguel Torres
Archivero Municipal - Ayuntamiento de Granada
